name: SkyWorld!!
author: SKYHIVIN
description:
Dont let the thumbnail fool you, there's much to explore!
First an attempt to compete in LCE hub's server lobby contest, now turned into a public map!!
i poured so much effort into this! hours! days! so why keep it all for myself? it's for others to use too!!!

made by SkyHeaven! a.k.a creator of SkyPack!!! (SkyHivin)
